records.summary: Page promoting yoga workshops in Wrocław led by Dominika (Domi), combining Yang and Yin elements with breathwork, meditation, and cacao ceremonies. No upcoming workshop dates, prices, or curriculum details are visible on the page itself.
records.style: Yin/Yang Vinyasa, Yin Yoga, Yoga Nidra, meditation
records.notes: All five key facts (dates, price, location, curriculum, duration) are missing from the page — visitors must click through to individual workshop listings to find any decision-making information.

records.summary: Page offering personalized 1:1 yoga sessions with Dominika, available online or in-person in Wrocław, with sessions lasting 60 minutes and tailored to individual goals. Price is not listed, but multiple student reviews are present.
records.notes: Strong social proof with multiple named reviews, but price is completely absent and teacher bio is missing, which undermines conversion; FAQ schema could strengthen SEO.

records.summary: A closed, ongoing weekly yoga group focused on advanced asana technique, yoga philosophy, and community, held every Tuesday at 18:30 at a studio in Wrocław. The group is currently full with a waiting list available.
records.notes: Price and location are clearly stated near the top, which is good, but the group is full and there is no curriculum breakdown, teacher bio, or schema markup to support SEO or conversions.
